body_txt: A character who, while having a domineering personality and/or a high rank in society, is markedly resigned when it comes to their personal life. They may be a Henpecked Husband , the passive side in a Power Dynamics Kink relationship, a target of sarcastic quips from their Love Interest , or a constant victim of a Trickster Girlfriend 's pranks. For the BDSM variation, see Powerful People Are Subs ; also compare Aggressive Submissive for when it comes to sex.
